creator: Alexander Terp
description:
1e308 prints as a 309-character string of zeros instead of using scientific notation.

**Repro:**
```
print(1e308)
// 100000000000000000000000000000000000...000 (309 chars)
// Should print: 1e+308 or 1.0e308
```

**Test files:** `bugs/operators/69_large_float_print.rad`
title: Large floats printed in full decimal notation instead of scientific
